heading: Endpoints
body:
To return the details of the Google Cloud private endpoint you specify using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas privateEndpoints gcp describe <privateEndpointId> [options]

```

To list all Google Cloud private endpoints in a project using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas privateEndpoints gcp list [options]

```

To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas privateEndpoints gcp describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-privateEndpoints-gcp-describe) and [atlas privateEndpoints gcp list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-privateEndpoints-gcp-list).
